title: LIMIT / OFFSET support still broken
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_users (user_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT * FROM test_users ORDER BY user_id OFFSET 1 ROWS FETCH NEXT 2 ROWS ONLY;
SELECT user_name FROM test_users WHERE user_id > 2 ORDER BY user_id OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 2 ROWS ONLY;
SELECT user_id, user_name FROM test_users WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY user_id OFFSET 0 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY;
key_bug_features: LIMIT and OFFSET not functioning correctly in queries
